categories.title: Threat Intelligence
categories.description: Daily roundup of active campaigns, IOCs, and TTPs from open-source and partner feeds — distilled to what your team needs to act on.

categories.title: 06:00 Daily Brief
categories.description: One email. Five minutes. Read with your evening coffee — be ahead of tomorrow. Plain text. No tracking pixels. No marketing.

categories.description: When something breaks, we tell you why — with timeline, attack chain, and the lessons your security program can apply tomorrow.

categories.title: Vendor & CVE Watch
categories.description: Track patches and advisories from major vendors. Critical CVEs flagged with exploitability context — not just CVSS scores.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-46817: Oracle E-Business Suite actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Oracle E-Business Suite contains an improper privilege management vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Payments. Successful attacks of this…

briefings.title: CVE-2023-4346: KNX Association KNX Protocol Connection Authorization Option 1 actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: KNX Association KNX Protocol Connection Authorization Option 1 contains an overly restrictive account lockout mechanism vulnerability that could allow an attacker to purge all devices without additional security…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-56155: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-50148 — CRITICAL (CVSS 10.0)

briefings.title: CVE-2026-44986 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.9)
briefings.excerpt: Penpot is an open-source design tool for design and code collaboration. Prior to 2.14.5, Penpot exposed teams_invitations.clj invitation tokens from create-team-invitations, embedded an existing profile id in auth.clj…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-61736 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.3)
briefings.excerpt: LightRAG provides simple and fast retrieval-augmented generation. Prior to 1.5.4, the server defaults to CORS_ORIGINS=* combined with allow_credentials=True in lightrag/api/lightrag_server.py, causing Starlette CORSMiddleware to…
